BPCommonRules.BikiniLadiesMultiplierDesc1: During any spin, when 1 or more Stacked Wild symbols appear fully on any reels, all wins for that spin will be multiplied by those Stacked Wild symbols' corresponding multipliers.
BPCommonRules.BikiniLadiesMultiplierDesc2: Stacked Wild symbol appearing fully on reel 1, 2, 3, 4 and 5 awards x1, x2, x3, x4 and x5 multiplier respectively.
BPCommonRules.BikiniLadiesMultiplierDesc3: When Stacked Wild symbols occupy all of the reels, 5000x of the total bet amount is awarded.
BPCommonRules.FreeSpinFeatureDesc1: 3, 4 or 5 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 8, 12 or 20 free spins respectively.
BPCommonRules.FreeSpinFeatureDesc2: When 1 or more Stacked Wild symbols appear partially on any reels during any free spins, the Stacked Wild symbol(s) will be nudged into its reels fully.
BPCommonRules.StackedWildDesc1: Stacked Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.

BPGameRules.BikiniParadisDesc1: Bikini Paradise is a 5-reel, 4-row video slot featuring stacked Wild symbols with multipliers.

BikiniParadisDesc2.value: The game is played with 25 bet lines (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
BikiniParadisDesc2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations
BikiniParadisDesc2.example: The game is played with 25 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

BPGameRules.BikiniParadisDesc16: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
